data.body: [operator-attested] Post-merge confirmation: reconcile-bridge live run https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29528337777 on origin/main (HEAD f10696769) created 1 job (every prior run since f2bde8d3b5 had 0 jobs) and completed with conclusion=success at 2026-07-16 19:52 UTC; the 'Run rebar reconciler' job passed, so the reconciler now executes and Jira sync is restored. Landed via Gerrit change 734 (MERGED; LLM-Review +1, Verified +1). actionlint on origin/main reports 0 runner-context violations in both reconcile-bridge.yml and reconcile-bridge-canary.yml.
